Penpot plugins API
    Preparing search index...
    • Fill

    Interface Fill

    Represents fill properties in Penpot. You can add a fill to any shape except for groups. This interface includes properties for defining solid color fills, gradient fills, and image fills.

    interface Fill {
        fillColor?: string;
        fillOpacity?: number;
        fillColorGradient?: Gradient;
        fillColorRefFile?: string;
        fillColorRefId?: string;
        fillImage?: ImageData;
    }
    • Defined in index.d.ts:1665
    Index

    Properties

    fillColor? fillOpacity? fillColorGradient? fillColorRefFile? fillColorRefId? fillImage?

    Properties

    OptionalfillColor

    fillColor?: string

    The optional solid fill color, represented as a string (e.g., '#FF5733').

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1669

    OptionalfillOpacity

    fillOpacity?: number

    The optional opacity level of the solid fill color, ranging from 0 (fully transparent) to 1 (fully opaque). Defaults to 1 if omitted.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1674

    OptionalfillColorGradient

    fillColorGradient?: Gradient

    The optional gradient fill defined by a Gradient object.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1678

    OptionalfillColorRefFile

    fillColorRefFile?: string

    The optional reference to an external file for the fill color.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1682

    OptionalfillColorRefId

    fillColorRefId?: string

    The optional reference ID within the external file for the fill color.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1686

    OptionalfillImage

    fillImage?: ImageData

    The optional image fill defined by an ImageData object.

    • Defined in index.d.ts:1690
